speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] Time for The Scoreboard, and basketball fans are in for a treat. The NBA playoffs officially tip off tomorrow with some cracking matchups locked in. The regular season wrapped up with Detroit dominating the Eastern Conference.

speaker: alice
text: [Australian accent] In the NBA, Oklahoma City led the entire league in wins this season, setting up what should be an absolute ripper of a playoff run. LeBron James is still doing LeBron things, ready to extend his playoff records when the Lakers face Houston on Saturday.

speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] And in the Premier League, we've got Manchester United taking on Leeds United tonight at 3pm our time. Arsenal and Liverpool are still flying the flag in Champions League, with both teams progressing to the quarterfinals. Fair dinkum, it doesn't get much better than that.

speaker: alice
text: [Australian accent] That is why we love sport - it brings out the best in people, creates legends, and gives us those moments that make us believe anything's possible.
